title: NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Tiruchirappalli) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website of NIT Tiruchirappalli. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation as per GOI norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech in Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Petrochemical Engineering or allied branches (1st class), M.Sc. in Chemistry or allied branches (1st class), M.Tech in Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Petrochemical Engineering or allied branches (1st class)
qualification.details: B. Tech in Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Petrochemical Engineering or allied branches (1st class) or M.Sc. in Chemistry or allied branches (1st class). Desired: M.Tech in Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Petrochemical Engineering or allied branches (1st class).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate-I post at NIT Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Project Associate-I position is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech in relevant engineering branches or an M.Sc. in Chemistry (1st class). An M.Tech in relevant engineering branches is also desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 31,000 plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Project Associate-I post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form details can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article, including a link to the official website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Associate-I at NIT Tiruchirappalli.
